svg.text: Year 1 starter — what to actually build first
Ordered by: unblocks most, costs least, fastest to ship
HW: None new required — runs on existing NTC infrastructure
SW: RESTful API wrapping existing NID database. OAuth2 for citizen login. Sandbox for devs.
Unblocks: cooperative KYC, land registry, investment portal, fintech, e-gov portals
Comparable: India's Aadhaar API (built in 18 months). Estonia X-Road (2 years).

g.text: NRB fintech sandbox + FX rule reform

svg.text: SW: Regulatory sandbox environment. Whitelisted API endpoints for payment cos. FX escrow rules.
Unblocks: Stripe/Wise integration, SaaS revenue repatriation, NRN remittance fintech
Comparable: Pakistan's SBP sandbox (2021) — got Stripe in 14 months. Kenya's M-Pesa reg model.
HW: 2–3 redundant servers in existing govt DC (NPR 20–40M)
SW: API gateway connecting IRD, OCR, Customs, Land Revenue. Single citizen SSO via NID.
Unblocks: one-stop investment portal, digital company registration, tax filing, permit tracking
Comparable: Rwanda RDB portal, Georgia's e-services portal (both built for under $5M).
HW: Handheld GPS survey devices + local server nodes in district offices (NPR 50–80M)
SW: GIS-linked title DB, tamper-evident ledger (not necessarily blockchain), NID-linked ownership.
Unblocks: agri land consolidation, cooperative collateral, property tax digitization
Comparable: Ethiopia's land reg (SIDA-funded), Odisha India's Bhulekh system.
